raw:
## Completed
Generalized Foreman crew timeout handling with a reusable `runAgentWithTimeout` wrapper and applied it to planner, developer, UI fallback, tester, and reviewer runs. Timeouts now degrade safely per role and are logged to ledger/activity.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/foreman/agent-timeouts.ts` - new pure timeout defaults, env parsing, decision, logging/degradation helpers.
- `extensions/foreman/index.ts` - wrapped all crew `runAgent` call sites with idle/max timeout handling and role-specific timeout behavior.
- `extensions/foreman/planner.ts` - kept planner timeout exports working via generalized helpers.
- `extensions/foreman/test/planner_timeout_test.sh` - extended timeout tests for all roles and degradation mappings.

## How To Verify
`grep -q "claude-opus-4-8:xhigh" extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_timeout_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/reviewer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/guard_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh`

## Notes
Verification command passed. I also ran the remaining Foreman helper/flow tests successfully.

## MACHINE BLOCK (MANDATORY — end your response with this exact block)
